title: Carry Water
description: Who needs a bucket? Carry water with your bare hands. Farm faster, survive easier.
body:
# Minimalist Water Transport

Carry Water brings a simple yet game-changing mechanic to your early survival: moving water without a bucket.

![moving water without a bucket.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eac95db3a4eaab1bda4827bfa52ab7bf57f5651.gif)
## Features

-  Scoop & Carry: Right-click or R water with your bare hands.
-  Create Puddles: Release water to create puddles. Add more to turn them into full water sources.
-  Extinguish: On fire? Burning mob? Splash water to put it out instantly.
-  Vanilla+ Focus: Seamless animations, balanced mechanics, and polished visuals.
  
**Configuration**

Adjust water retention time.
Configure steps needed for infinite water sources.
10 Languages Supported (English, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, Russian, and more).
